fragments.plaintext:
SHE’S DONE IT AGAIN.✨🏆

Faith Kipyegon has smashed the mile World Record by 5 seconds with a blistering time of 4:07. Today, she becomes the first person to break all 3 records for the 1500m, 5000m and mile all in one year. 🔥

📸: Guillaume Laurent

caption.text:
SHE’S DONE IT AGAIN.✨🏆

Faith Kipyegon has smashed the mile World Record by 5 seconds with a blistering time of 4:07. Today, she becomes the first person to break all 3 records for the 1500m, 5000m and mile all in one year. 🔥

📸: Guillaume Laurent
